title: Hack-A-Thon 2.0
desc: A 24-hour sprint to build innovative solutions using modern tech stacks. Participants will have access to mentors and high-speed internet to bring their ideas to life.

title: Bug Squash
desc: Find and fix critical bugs in a pre-built codebase under time pressure. Test your debugging skills and win amazing prizes.

title: Circuit Saga
desc: Design and debug complex analog and digital circuits on a breadboard. Show your prowess in electronics and system design.

title: Signal Quest
desc: Analyze and process signals to retrieve hidden data in real-time. A challenge for those who love signal processing and communication systems.

title: Grid Master
desc: Simulate and optimize a smart power grid for maximum efficiency. Learn about the future of energy management and distribution.

title: Motor Mania
desc: Assemble and control a high-performance DC motor setup. A hands-on competition for electrical engineering enthusiasts.

title: CAD Design Expo
desc: Create intricate 3D models of mechanical parts based on specifications. Showcase your proficiency in industry-standard CAD software.

title: Aero Glider
desc: Construct a hand-launched glider with maximum flight time and stability. Apply principles of aerodynamics and structural design.

title: Bridge It
desc: Build a scale model bridge that can withstand maximum load-to-weight ratio. A true test of structural engineering and creativity.

title: Town Planner
desc: Design a sustainable and efficient urban layout for a future city. Focus on green spaces, infrastructure, and smart transit.
